Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

The patch looks OK, but seems to be missing something for background. 

Is this patch needed in el9.x series and/or upstream?  If yes, please also add to that series, and submit upstream.  If not, is this fix imported from an upstream kernel patch that should be described in the patch header?  If the fix only applies to ldiskfs code changes, then it should be merged into the original patch.

commit.subject: LU-17851 ldiskfs: ensure_credits to check tx state
commit.message:
LU-17851 ldiskfs: ensure_credits to check tx state

__ext4_journal_ensure_credits() may allow a long fs operation
like fallocate to run for too long, if the initial credits
estimation is enough high.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12311
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ia7bf262dc4dfd4fb8e75656486442183d7e8a5c1
